old_value: {"id":"smallhold-vkrm","title":"Missing security response headers","description":"No security headers are set on HTTP responses. The server (server.rs) only configures CORS. Missing headers: X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, X-Frame-Options: DENY, Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin, Content-Security-Policy (at minimum default-src 'self'), Cache-Control: no-store on authenticated API responses. Fix: add a tower middleware layer that injects these headers on all responses.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-18T18:23:36.18289973Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T18:23:36.18289973Z","labels":["codereview"]}
